entry.title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode with cert-manager and Velero

link.title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode with cert-manager and Velero

entry.summary: In the previous post, Build secure and cheap Amazon EKS Auto Mode I used cert-manager to obtain a wildcard certificate for the Ingress. When using Let’s Encrypt production certificates, it’s useful to back them up and restore them when recreating the cluster. Here are a few steps to install Velero and perform the backup + restore procedure for cert-manager objects. Links: Backup and Res...
